name: @metorial/memberspot
description: Manage members, course access, and progress on the Memberspot e-learning platform. List, look up, and delete users. Grant, revoke, or delete course access for members (auto-creating members when granting access). Retrieve available offers/courses, track course progress, and fetch exam results. Control chapter-level access for fine-grained content delivery. Set and list custom user properties for personalization and segmentation. Generate single sign-on login tokens for passwordless user access.
